messages.content:
can you improve this for cv: CHINESE TEACHER | GLASGOW CHINESE SCHOOL | SEPTEMBER 2012 - PRESENT
·	Teacher and supervise classes of students between 20-25 pupils.
·	Manage class homework assignments including assessing, tutor and marking written work.

CHINESE TEACHER | GLASGOW CHINESE SCHOOL | SEPTEMBER 2012 - PRESENT
· Utilize effective teaching methods to educate and guide classes of 20-25 students.
· Develop and implement homework assignments, while assessing and marking written work.
· Provide individual tutoring and support to students as needed.
· Foster a positive learning environment that encourages student engagement and participation.
· Collaborate with fellow teachers to enhance curriculum and teaching strategies.
· Maintain open and effective communication with parents regarding student progress and achievements.

can you improve this for cv: ·	Manage sales orders and requests by phone and online.
·	Ensure that all orders are packaged and delivered correctly.

· Effectively handle sales order inquiries and requests both via phone and online platforms.
· Maintain accuracy and attention to detail in managing and processing sales orders.
· Verify proper packaging of orders to ensure safe and secure delivery.
· Collaborate with shipping and logistics teams to coordinate timely delivery of orders.
· Provide exceptional customer service, addressing any concerns or issues related to orders.
· Continuously strive to meet or exceed customer expectations and enhance overall customer satisfaction.
· Utilize organizational and time management skills to efficiently manage multiple orders simultaneously.
can you write the skills and abilities from above experience?

Skills and Abilities:
- Proficiency in teaching and supervising classes of 20-25 students.
- Strong ability to assess and mark written work, providing constructive feedback.
- Effective management of class homework assignments and tracking student progress.
- Individual tutoring and support to cater to the diverse needs of students.
- Ability to create a positive and engaging learning environment.
- Collaboration and teamwork with fellow teachers to enhance curriculum and teaching strategies.
- Excellent communication skills to maintain open dialogue with parents regarding student progress.
- Efficiently manage sales orders and requests, both through phone and online channels.
- Attention to detail in ensuring accurate packaging and delivery of orders.
- Collaboration with shipping and logistics teams to ensure timely delivery.
- Exceptional customer service skills in addressing inquiries, concerns, and issues related to orders.
- Commitment to meeting and exceeding customer expectations to enhance satisfaction.
- Strong organizational and time management abilities to handle multiple orders simultaneously.
can you write a cv profile from above information?

As a dedicated and experienced Chinese Teacher at Glasgow Chinese School, I have consistently demonstrated my passion for education and commitment to student success. With a proven track record of effectively teaching and supervising classes of 20-25 students, I have honed my skills in assessing and marking written work, providing constructive feedback to promote growth and improvement. Furthermore, I excel in managing class homework assignments and ensuring student progress through dedicated individual tutoring and support.

Collaboration is a cornerstone of my teaching approach, as I actively seek to work with fellow teachers to enhance curriculum and teaching strategies. By fostering a positive and engaging learning environment, I encourage student participation, creating an atmosphere conducive to learning and growth.

In addition to my teaching experience, I possess strong abilities in managing sales orders and requests. Through efficient handling of inquiries, both over phone and online platforms, I strive to ensure a seamless customer experience. Attention to detail is paramount, as I meticulously verify packaging and coordinate with shipping and logistics teams to guarantee accurate and timely delivery.

With exceptional communication skills, I maintain open lines of dialogue with parents, providing regular updates on student progress and achievements. My commitment to meeting and exceeding customer expectations, coupled with excellent customer service skills, allows me to address any concerns or issues related to sales orders, ensuring maximum satisfaction.

Overall, I bring a combination of pedagogical expertise, organizational abilities, and dedication to any role, both as a Chinese Teacher and in managing sales orders effectively. My goal is to leverage my skills and experience to contribute to the success of an organization while fostering a supportive and impactful learning environment for students.

Experienced Chinese Teacher with a strong track record of successfully teaching and supervising classes of 20-25 students. Skilled in assessing and marking written work, providing individual tutoring, and managing class homework assignments. Collaborative and dedicated, adept at enhancing curriculum and fostering a positive learning environment. Additionally, proficient in managing sales orders and ensuring accurate packaging and timely delivery. Exceptional communication skills and commitment to customer satisfaction. Seeking opportunities to contribute expertise and create impactful learning experiences.

can you wirte skills and abilities from above information

Skills and Abilities:

- Strong customer service skills, adept at addressing inquiries, concerns, and issues related to sales orders.
- Detail-oriented with a keen eye for accuracy in managing and processing sales orders.
- Proficient in verifying proper packaging to ensure safe and secure delivery of orders.
- Effective collaboration and coordination with shipping and logistics teams for timely order delivery.
- Ability to handle multiple orders simultaneously, utilizing excellent organizational and time management skills.
- Skilled in utilizing effective teaching methods to educate and guide classes of students.
- Experience in developing and implementing homework assignments, assessing, and marking written work.
- Proficient in providing individual tutoring and support to students as needed.
- Ability to foster a positive learning environment that promotes student engagement and participation.
- Collaborative mindset, working with fellow teachers to enhance curriculum and teaching strategies.
- Strong communication skills, maintaining open and effective communication with parents regarding student progress and achievements.
- Experience in waitressing, including taking food and drink orders and preparing drinks.
- Ability to assist chefs in the preparation of dishes as a kitchen assistant.
skills for teawork in one sentence
Strong teamwork skills, collaborating effectively with others to achieve common goals, communicate openly, and support fellow team members.

can you write a profile for job cv in 5 sentence: can speak English, mandarin, Cantonese. use to do administrator. pick up phone lines, dealing with orders and packing. main point is can be a telesales and good at paperworks.

Bilingual professional fluent in English, Mandarin, and Cantonese, equipped with strong administrative experience. Proficient in phone handling, order processing, and packaging. Highly skilled in telesales, effectively promoting products and services while providing outstanding customer service. Exceptional attention to detail in paperwork management ensures accuracy and efficiency. A versatile and organized professional capable of seamlessly juggling multiple tasks to drive success in administrative and telesales roles.
